.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(219, 228, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(219, 228, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f5f8ff 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f5f8ff, color-mix(in srgb, #f5f8ff 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f5f8ff 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f5f8ff, color-mix(in srgb, #f5f8ff 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(219, 228, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(219, 228, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(46, 125, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(251, 192, 45, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(245, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(232, 238, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
